response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 15+ years of experience, solid open-source background (GISCollective, D-lang projects), Linux/Unix fluency, and demonstrated architectural and teaching ability. However, the role explicitly requires German at C1 level and the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard blocker for a client-facing lead role in the DACH market. Formal team leadership experience is also light relative to a Head of Development position.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux/Unix background with founder-level OSS project (GISCollective)
Broad senior-level full-stack and architecture experience across 15+ years and multiple domains
Proven mentoring/teaching ability via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: German listed as Basic, far below the required C1 level
No explicit Head-of-Development or formal people-management track record
Limited evidence of UML modeling and structured requirements-management practice
